summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EventFlow mobile event management app with Sensa design style. All major features working correctly including dashboard with 'sensa' logo, cream background #F5F5F0, Space Grotesk font, letter-spacing, task management, event creation/editing, calendar, settings with custom reminders, and 3-tab navigation. UI matches Sensa design requirements perfectly.

design_issues.issue: Dark accents #1A1A1A not detected via CSS selector, but visually present in UI
design_issues.note: Visual inspection shows dark elements are present, may be a selector detection issue

passed_tests: Backend API - All 12 endpoints working (100% success)
Dashboard shows 'sensa' logo in header with proper styling
UI uses cream background #F5F5F0 (rgb(245, 245, 240)) correctly
Text uses lowercase with letter-spacing 2.7px (Sensa style)
Space Grotesk font family properly applied
Secondary gray #6B6B6B (rgb(107, 107, 107)) used correctly
Events page shows calendar component and events list
Calendar displays with proper date indicators
Settings page allows adding custom reminders
Settings page allows deleting reminders with confirmation
Task checkboxes work - can mark tasks as completed
Archive functionality opens dialog with completed tasks
Event creation works via desktop 'додати подію' button
Event editing works via event detail dialog
Event detail dialog shows all options (edit/delete/export)
Bottom navigation has 3 tabs: головна, події, налаштування
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Ukrainian localization working throughout app
Mobile-responsive design working properly
Task sections: протерміновано, сьогодні, незабаром display correctly
Reminder management with days input and icon selection
Event form has all required fields with proper validation
Calendar date picker functionality works in event form
Settings changes are saved and applied correctly
